## 说明 / Notice

感谢你的关注，但 **Precis 目前处于超早期原型阶段，暂不接收外部 Pull Request**。

Thank you for your interest, but **Precis is currently in ultra-early prototype stage and is not accepting external Pull Requests**.

原因 / Reasons：
- 架构尚未稳定，核心代码可能大幅重构 / Architecture is not yet stable; core code may be heavily refactored
- 测试覆盖不足，无法安全合并外部代码 / Test coverage is insufficient to safely merge external code
- 项目方向仍在验证中 / Project direction is still being validated

如果你有兴趣交流，欢迎前往 [Discussions](https://github.com/AirSaiga/Precis/discussions)。

If you are interested in exchanging ideas, please visit [Discussions](https://github.com/AirSaiga/Precis/discussions).

---

> 如果你是通过自动化工具误提交了这个 PR，请直接关闭即可，无需额外说明。
>
> If you submitted this PR by automated tool by mistake, please close it directly; no additional explanation is needed.
